description_wiki: Cambodia, officially the Kingdom of Cambodia, is a country in Mainland Southeast Asia.
Thailand, officially the Kingdom of Thailand, and formerly known as Siam until 1939, is a country located in Mainland Southeast Asia.

description: island country in Southeast Asia and Oceania
description_wiki: Indonesia, officially the Republic of Indonesia, is a country in Southeast Asia and Oceania, between the Indian and Pacific oceans.

description: sovereign island country and city-state in maritime Southeast Asia
description_wiki: Singapore, officially the Republic of Singapore, is an island country and city-state in Southeast Asia.

description: largest Christian Church, made up of 24 autonomous Churches in communion with the Pope, part of the Latin Church aka Latin Christianity aka western Christianity
description_wiki: The Catholic Church (Latin: Ecclesia Catholica), commonly called the Roman Catholic Church, is the largest Christian church, with an estimated 1.28 to 1.41 billion baptized members worldwide as of 2026.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Alaska (  ə-LASS-kə) is a non-contiguous U.S. state located in the northwestern regions of North America.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Minnesota is a state in the Upper Midwestern region of the United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: California () is a state in the Western United States that lies on the Pacific Coast.

aliases: Pueblo de San José de Guadalupe
Pueblo de San Jose de Guadalupe
description: city and county seat of Santa Clara County, California, United States
description_wiki: San Jose, officially the City of San José (  SAN hoh-ZAY, -⁠SAY; Spanish: [saŋ xoˈse]), is the most populous city in the San Francisco Bay Area and Northern California, and the 12th-most populous in the United States, with 997,368 residents.

description: American international fast food chain restaurant
description_wiki: Wendy's International, LLC, is an American international fast food restaurant chain founded by Dave Thomas on November 15, 1969, in Columbus, Ohio.
